stemHtml: Near top of climb on IFR, total comm failure in VMC. What should you do?

options.a: Continue VMC or IMC, land at an aerodrome with radar.
options.b: Continue VMC to destination and report to the nearest ATS.
options.c: Hold at the IAF until the ETA, then approach.
options.d: Continue VMC, land at the nearest suitable aerodrome, and report arrival to the appropriate ATS unit.
